What it is: The battery is one trivial task, so every model scores 6/6 — the benchmark has nothing to discriminate on
What it solves: THE ROOT CAUSE OF THE WHOLE EPIC. BL-385 stops the benchmark REPORTING a false winner; this slice
is what gives it something true to report. The single battery item today,
`coder-task-01-word-frequency`, is one exported function in ONE file (`src/wordFrequency.js`),
against a provided test file, wi…
How it works: Every task in the battery is run, not just the first
